title: TopBuild (NYSE:BLD) Misses Q2 Revenue Estimates, Stock Drops
text: Revenue Miss: TopBuild fell short of analyst expectations with Q2 revenue of $1.37 billion versus the estimated $1.40 billion—a 2.3% shortfall. Year-over-year growth reached only 3.7%. EPS Miss: The company reported non-GAAP EPS of $5.42, below the analyst expectation of $5.67, representing a 4.5% miss despite improvement from the prior year's $5.25. Guidance Disappointment: Full-year revenue guidance of $5.4 billion came in 2% below analyst estimates, while EBITDA guidance of $1.09 billion trailed estimates of $1.13 billion. Stock Performance: The stock traded down 7.4% to $394 immediately following the results, reflecting investor disappointment with the company's performance and forward outlook. Assessment: The analysis characterized the quarter as mediocre, noting that TopBuild unfortunately missed on both revenue and EPS while facing margin pressure from increased operational expenses.
